title: PagerDuty Service Dependency Graph Alert Storm Score
app: PagerDuty service dependencies API + Events API merged at HEC
spl:
index=alerts sourcetype="pagerduty:incident"
| eval root=coalesce(impacted_service, service_name)
| bin _time span=15m
| stats dc(incident_number) as fanout by _time, root
| where fanout>=5
| sort -fanout
description: Wide dependency graphs fan out pages during single-root outages.
value: Helps SRE tune dependency alerts and status page comms.
implementation: Requires nightly dependency snapshot join; optional graph reduction.
